'''âm-m-ch''' ('''kamamach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necromance|necromance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necromance|necromance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kamamach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamach|thimamach]] || [[word:jimamach|jimamach]] || [[word:shimamach|shimamach]] || [[word:kimamach|kimamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamach|thuthumamach]] || [[word:jujumamach|jujumamach]] || [[word:shushumamach|shushumamach]] || [[word:kukumamach|kukumamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumamach|thumamach]] || [[word:jumamach|jumamach]] || [[word:shumamach|shumamach]] || [[word:kumamach|kumamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumamach|thumamach]] || [[word:jumamach|jumamach]] || [[word:shumamach|shumamach]] || [[word:kumamach|kumamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themamach|themamach]] || [[word:jemamach|jemamach]] || [[word:shemamach|shemamach]] || [[word:kemamach|kemamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomamach|thothomamach]] || [[word:jojomamach|jojomamach]] || [[word:shoshomamach|shoshomamach]] || [[word:kokomamach|kokomamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamach|thomamach]] || [[word:jomamach|jomamach]] || [[word:shomamach|shomamach]] || [[word:komamach|komamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamach|thomamach]] || [[word:jomamach|jomamach]] || [[word:shomamach|shomamach]] || [[word:komamach|komamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmamach|thĂŠmamach]] || [[word:jĂŠmamach|jĂŠmamach]] || [[word:shĂŠmamach|shĂŠmamach]] || [[word:kĂŠmamach|kĂŠmamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamamach|thathamamach]] || [[word:jajamamach|jajamamach]] || [[word:shashamamach|shashamamach]] || [[word:kakamamach|kakamamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamamach|thamamach]] || [[word:jamamach|jamamach]] || [[word:shamamach|shamamach]] || [[word:kamamach|kamamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamamach|thamamach]] || [[word:jamamach|jamamach]] || [[word:shamamach|shamamach]] || [[word:kamamach|kamamach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamamach|shamamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamamach|goshamamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamamach|gokishamamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamamachnĂŒ|shamamachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamamachnknĂŒ|goshamamachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamachnĂŒ|gokishamamachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamamachshĂ«|shamamachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamamachnkshĂ«|goshamamachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamamachshĂ«|gokishamamachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamachro|shamamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamachnkro|goshamamachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamachro|gokishamamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamachmu|shamamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamachnkmu|goshamamachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamachmu|gokishamamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamamachsher|shamamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamamachnksher|goshamamachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamamachsher|gokishamamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamamachng|shamamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamamachnkng|goshamamachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamamachng|gokishamamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamamachya|shamamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamamachnkya|goshamamachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamamachya|gokishamamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamamachyam|shamamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamamachnkyam|goshamamachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamamachyam|gokishamamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamachnĂŒshĂ«|shamamachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamamachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamamachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamachnĂŒro|shamamachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamachnknĂŒro|goshamamachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamachnĂŒro|gokishamamachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamachnĂŒmu|shamamachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamachnknĂŒmu|goshamamachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamachnĂŒmu|gokishamamachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamachshĂ«nĂŒ|shamamachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamamachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamamachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamachshĂ«ro|shamamachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamachnkshĂ«ro|goshamamachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamachshĂ«ro|gokishamamachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamachshĂ«mu|shamamachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamachnkshĂ«mu|goshamamachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamachshĂ«mu|gokishamamachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamachronĂŒ|shamamachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamachnkronĂŒ|goshamamachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamachronĂŒ|gokishamamachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamachroshĂ«|shamamachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamachnkroshĂ«|goshamamachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamachroshĂ«|gokishamamachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamachromu|shamamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamachnkromu|goshamamachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamachromu|gokishamamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamachmunĂŒ|shamamachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamachnkmunĂŒ|goshamamachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamachmunĂŒ|gokishamamachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamachmushĂ«|shamamachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamachnkmushĂ«|goshamamachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamachmushĂ«|gokishamamachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamachmuro|shamamachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamachnkmuro|goshamamachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamachmuro|gokishamamachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
